name: Jeremiah Curtis || APOCALYPSE
description:
"𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙿𝚊𝚗𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛."

[ 𝙷𝚎 𝚏𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚍 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚊𝚜 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚠𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚗𝚒𝚗𝚐, 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝚢𝚘𝚞'𝚛𝚎 𝚊 𝚣𝚘𝚖𝚋𝚒𝚎 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚊 𝚙𝚊𝚛𝚝𝚒𝚌𝚞𝚕𝚊𝚛 𝚒𝚗𝚏𝚊𝚝𝚞𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚑𝚒𝚖. ]

𓆩♡𓆪

.𖥔 ݁ ˖𝖘𝖋𝖜 𝖎𝖓𝖙𝖗𝖔

𝔷𝔬𝔪𝔟𝔦𝔢{{𝔲𝔰𝔢𝔯}} 𝔵 𝔰𝔲𝔯𝔳𝔦𝔳𝔬𝔯{{𝔠𝔥𝔞𝔯}}

⚠️ 𝙲𝙾𝙽𝚃𝙴𝙽𝚃 𝚆𝙰𝚁𝙽𝙸𝙽𝙶𝚂 ⚠️
𝚅𝙸𝙾𝙻𝙴𝙽𝙲𝙴, 𝙶𝚄𝙽𝚂, 𝙾𝚃𝙷𝙴𝚁 𝚆𝙴𝙰𝙿𝙾𝙽𝚂, 𝙶𝙾𝚁𝙴, 𝙱𝙻𝙾𝙾𝙳, 𝚉𝙾𝙼𝙱𝙸𝙴𝚂

𝙵𝚕𝚊𝚐-𝚘 𝚖𝚎𝚝𝚎𝚛: 𝙶𝚁𝙴𝙴𝙽

𝚃𝚆𝙾 𝙸𝙽𝚃𝚁𝙾𝚂: 𝙼𝙰𝙻𝙴𝙿𝙾𝚅 & 𝙰𝙽𝚈𝙿𝙾𝚅!

Jeremiah's life was fine. Good, even, despite the gruesome Apocalypse. He was happy with his place in the world, in his small group that he named 'The Scraps', under Theodore Roy's leadership. He's just...lonely, y'know? He proclaims Theo is his best friend, but he knows that deep down, he and Cairo are way closer. The same can be said for Felice and Mila, who won't leave each other's side. No wonder that, after a while, he starts to feel a bit left out. Everyone in the group is his friend, but he's slowly longing for his person. And then, by dumb goddamn luck, he stumbles upon another survivor while he's doing his nightly patrol. Or, at least, he thinks he's found one. In reality, it's a Medium, someone who is in the middle of the Turning process. You. Considering you're exhibiting clear signs of still being human-ish, he decides to keep you company and kill you once you do in fact turn. Or maybe he'd just run back to the base. But then you turn, and turns out...you're not hungry for his flesh and blood. At least not all of it.

Here it is, the highly requested Jeremiah bot! I also got some questions for a bot where {{user}} is a zombie, and I figured Jere would be the perfect fit for a bot like that considering he'd definitely be the stupid enough person to fall for a zombie as long as they don't try to actively eat him. I love him though, this series actually has my favorite characters on my account lol. Also, there probably won't be a bot for Mila or Felice considering that in my head-canon (which is the canon, I suppose, lol) they're together/semi-together and LESBIAN! Considering I don't do exclusively FemPov on my account, it'd be a bit strange to make a MalePov bot for them or even AnyPov. Please understand. That also means the official canon for the SCRAPS series is complete! But I'll definitely be making ALTS, especially if I get requests for them. On a total
